narrative:
Centerville-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 928 registered voters, with 66.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
